'''ngofathaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:ilioischial|ilioischial]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-f-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ilioischial|ilioischial]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ngofathaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngofathithi|ngofathithi]] || [[word:ngofathiji|ngofathiji]] || [[word:ngofathishi|ngofathishi]] || [[word:ngofathiki|ngofathiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngofathuthuthu|ngofathuthuthu]] || [[word:ngofathujuju|ngofathujuju]] || [[word:ngofathushushu|ngofathushushu]] || [[word:ngofathukuku|ngofathukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngofathuthu|ngofathuthu]] || [[word:ngofathuju|ngofathuju]] || [[word:ngofathushu|ngofathushu]] || [[word:ngofathuku|ngofathuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngofathufthuf|ngofathufthuf]] || [[word:ngofathufjuf|ngofathufjuf]] || [[word:ngofathufshuf|ngofathufshuf]] || [[word:ngofathufkuf|ngofathufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngofathethe|ngofathethe]] || [[word:ngofatheje|ngofatheje]] || [[word:ngofatheshe|ngofatheshe]] || [[word:ngofatheke|ngofatheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngofathothotho|ngofathothotho]] || [[word:ngofathojojo|ngofathojojo]] || [[word:ngofathoshosho|ngofathoshosho]] || [[word:ngofathokoko|ngofathokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngofathotho|ngofathotho]] || [[word:ngofathojo|ngofathojo]] || [[word:ngofathosho|ngofathosho]] || [[word:ngofathoko|ngofathoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngofathofthof|ngofathofthof]] || [[word:ngofathofjof|ngofathofjof]] || [[word:ngofathofshof|ngofathofshof]] || [[word:ngofathofkof|ngofathofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngofathĂŻfthĂŻf|ngofathĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:ngofathĂŻfjĂŻf|ngofathĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:ngofathĂŻfshĂŻf|ngofathĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:ngofathĂŻfkĂŻf|ngofathĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngofathĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|ngofathĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:ngofathĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|ngofathĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:ngofathĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|ngofathĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:ngofathĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|ngofathĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngofathĂŻfthĂŻf|ngofathĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:ngofathĂŻfjĂŻf|ngofathĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:ngofathĂŻfshĂŻf|ngofathĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:ngofathĂŻfkĂŻf|ngofathĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngofathĂŻfthĂŻf|ngofathĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:ngofathĂŻfjĂŻf|ngofathĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:ngofathĂŻfshĂŻf|ngofathĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:ngofathĂŻfkĂŻf|ngofathĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngofathĂŠthĂŠ|ngofathĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:ngofathĂŠjĂŠ|ngofathĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:ngofathĂŠshĂŠ|ngofathĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:ngofathĂŠkĂŠ|ngofathĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngofathathatha|ngofathathatha]] || [[word:ngofathajaja|ngofathajaja]] || [[word:ngofathashasha|ngofathashasha]] || [[word:ngofathakaka|ngofathakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngofathatha|ngofathatha]] || [[word:ngofathaja|ngofathaja]] || [[word:ngofathasha|ngofathasha]] || [[word:ngofathaka|ngofathaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngofathafthaf|ngofathafthaf]] || [[word:ngofathafjaf|ngofathafjaf]] || [[word:ngofathafshaf|ngofathafshaf]] || [[word:ngofathafkaf|ngofathafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:ngofathasha|ngofathasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:ngofathshĂ«asha|ngofathshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngofathroasha|ngofathroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:ngofathmuasha|ngofathmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:ngofathyaasha|ngofathyaasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongofathnkshĂ«asha|gongofathnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongofathnkroasha|gongofathnkroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongofathnkmuasha|gongofathnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gongofathnkyaasha|gongofathnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:ngofafathasha|ngofafathasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:ngofafathshĂ«asha|ngofafathshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngofafathroasha|ngofafathroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:ngofafathmuasha|ngofafathmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:ngofafathyaasha|ngofafathyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongofafathnkshĂ«asha|gongofafathnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongofafathnkroasha|gongofafathnkroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongofafathnkmuasha|gongofafathnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gongofafathnkyaasha|gongofafathnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:ngefĂŠthasha|ngefĂŠthasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:ngefĂŠthshĂ«asha|ngefĂŠthshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngefĂŠthroasha|ngefĂŠthroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:ngefĂŠthmuasha|ngefĂŠthmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:ngefĂŠthyaasha|ngefĂŠthyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongefĂŠthnkshĂ«asha|gongefĂŠthnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongefĂŠthnkroasha|gongefĂŠthnkroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongefĂŠthnkmuasha|gongefĂŠthnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gongefĂŠthnkyaasha|gongefĂŠthnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:ngoffathasha|ngoffathasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:ngoffathshĂ«asha|ngoffathshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngoffathroasha|ngoffathroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:ngoffathmuasha|ngoffathmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:ngoffathyaasha|ngoffathyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongoffathnkshĂ«asha|gongoffathnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongoffathnkroasha|gongoffathnkroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongoffathnkmuasha|gongoffathnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gongoffathnkyaasha|gongoffathnkyaasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|5db7a01}}
